body: Dr. Meera, JIDA's Oct issue landed. One item relevant to your high-risk adult patients — 2,100-patient trial showed 3-month fluoride recall cuts caries recurrence 38% better than 6-month. Worth a look (2-min abstract). Want me to pull it + draft a patient-ed WhatsApp you can share? — JIDA Oct 2026 p.14
rationale: External research digest with merchant-relevant clinical anchor

body: Dr. Meera, quick compliance heads up: DCI revised radiograph limits from 1.5 mSv to 1.0 mSv effective Dec 15. E-speed film passes, D-speed doesn't. Aapka clinic RVG use karta hai na? Just need to document it.
rationale: Regulatory alert with specific date and limit, framed collegially

body: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's clinic here 🦷 It's been 5 months since your last visit — your 6-month cleaning recall is due. Apke liye 2 slots ready hain: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. ₹299 cleaning + complimentary fluoride. Reply 1 for Wed, 2 for Thu, or tell us a time that works.
rationale: Customer recall referencing specific past visit, real slots, and real pricing

body: Hi Bharat, Vera checking in. Aapke GBP calls last 7 days me 50% drop hue hain (down to 4 vs usual baseline 12). Ek nayi 'Free Consultation' offer run karein to drive immediate calls?
rationale: Specific performance metric drop with a proposed action to fix it

body: Bharat, aapka Pro plan 12 din me expire ho raha hai. Your unverified profile will lose its visibility boost. ₹4999 renewal pe main aapka verification process bhi initiate karwa dungi. Should I send the payment link?
rationale: Tying renewal to a specific value-add (verification)

body: Hi Lakshmi, Diwali is 188 days away. Top salons in Kapra usually start their pre-bridal packages around now. Aapka 'Hair Spa @ ₹499' is active — want me to draft a festive combo post for your GBP?
rationale: Long-range festival prep hooked into local peer behavior

body: Hi Kavya, Studio11 Family Salon here. Aapka bridal trial hue 1 month ho gaya, and your big day is in Nov! ✨ Humara 30-day skin prep program abhi shuru karne ka best time hai. Would you like Priya to give you a quick call to discuss?
rationale: Highly personalized customer followup for a high-value event

body: Lakshmi, quick question — iss week Kapra me sabse zyada demand kis service ki rahi? Balayage ya kuch aur? Main uss hisaab se aapke Google keywords tweak kar sakti hoon.
rationale: Curiosity ask with a clear benefit to the merchant answering

body: Hi Anjali, Glamour Lounge ka subscription expire hue 38 days ho gaye. Uske baad se views 12% down hain and 24 lapsed customers add hue hain. Ek 'Welcome Back' campaign run karein to recover them? I'll set it up if you renew.
rationale: Winback with hard data on what they are losing by not being active

body: Suresh, aaj raat DC vs MI match hai Arun Jaitley me. Perfect time to push your 'Buy 1 Pizza Get 1 Free (Tue-Thu)' offer to locals ordering in. Want me to blast a WhatsApp update to your active customers?
rationale: Real-time hyper-local external trigger matched with merchant's existing offer

body: Suresh, ek pattern dikha hai: last 30 days me 4 reviews me 'late delivery' mention hua hai (e.g. 'took 50 mins'). Should we add a quick auto-reply to orders setting expectations during rush hours?
rationale: Surfacing a negative pattern before it hurts rating too much

body: Great news Suresh! Mylari South Indian Cafe is just 5 reviews away from hitting 150 total on Google. Ek quick nudge bhejein aapke regular 'Weekday Lunch Thali' customers ko to cross the line today?
rationale: Positive reinforcement gamified into a specific action

body: Awesome. For a corporate bulk thali, we can package 5 Thalis @ ₹599. I'll create a simple digital menu flyer you can forward to offices in Indiranagar. Sound good to start?
rationale: Following up on active planning intent with concrete next step

body: Hi Karthik, views are down 30% this week. Standard April/May seasonal dip as New Year resolutioners drop off. Perfect time to push your '3 FREE Trial Classes' to student groups. Want me to prep the post?
rationale: Normalizing a dip as seasonal but offering a tactical pivot

body: Hi Rashmi, PowerHouse Fitness here! We've missed you for the last 2 months. Hope your weight loss goals are still on track. Apke liye ek special offer hai: rejoin this week and get a free PT session. Reply YES if interested!
rationale: Customer winback utilizing previous training focus

body: Great! Summer camps are peaking. Suggest a 4-week program, 3 classes/week, age 7-12, for ₹2,499. Main exact aisi ek GBP post draft kar deti hoon. Approve karenge?
rationale: Providing structured advice for an intent request and asking for approval

body: Hi Sumitra, Zen Yoga Studio here! Hope Karthik enjoyed his kids yoga trial yesterday. Our next session is Sat 3 May, 8am. Would you like to confirm a spot for him?
rationale: Prompt followup post-trial for a dependent

body: Ramesh, URGENT alert: Manufacturer Z has issued a recall on atorvastatin batches AT2024-1102 & AT2024-1108. I've cross-referenced this — want me to pull the list of your chronic patients taking this so you can notify them?
rationale: High urgency external supply alert offering a concrete operational assist

body: Namaste Mr. Sharma, Apollo Health Plus se. Aapki metformin aur atorvastatin ka 1-month stock 28 April ko khatam hone wala hai. Kya main same medicines aapke saved address par kal subah deliver karwa doon?
rationale: Proactive refill for an elderly patient in preferred language

body: Ramesh, summer trends are shifting: ORS (+40%) and sunscreen (+38%) demand is spiking in Jaipur, while cold/cough is dropping. Have you moved these to the front display yet?
rationale: Data-backed category trend advice for pharmacy layout

body: Vikas, aapka Sunrise Medicos profile abhi tak unverified hai. Verifying it via phone/postcard can boost your views by ~30%. Do you have 2 minutes to start the process with me now?
rationale: Clear ROI attached to an administrative task

body: Dr. Meera, IDA Delhi is hosting a webinar on Digital Impressions (Primescan/Trios) on May 2nd, 7pm. Free for members, earns 2 credits. Should I send you the registration link?
rationale: Curated professional development relevant to dentists

body: Dr. Meera, heads up: 'Smile Studio' opened 1.3km away on Apr 8. They are running a 'Cleaning @ ₹199' offer. Aapka ₹299 cleaning active hai. Want to highlight complimentary fluoride to stand out?
rationale: Competitive intelligence with a strategic recommendation, not just panic

body: Padma, your calls are UP 15% this week (18 total)! That kids yoga post is likely driving traffic. Want to double down and run a small ₹500 ad boost on it to capture more weekend signups?
rationale: Capitalizing on positive momentum

body: Hi Anjali, haven't heard from you in a over a month! How's Glamour Lounge doing? Are walk-ins steady or looking to push some weekend appointments?
rationale: Low-pressure re-engagement for a dormant merchant

body: Hi, Vera here. Just reviewing your profile. Everything looks stable, but let me know if you want to update any offers or run a campaign this week.
rationale: Generic check-in

body: Hi there, just a quick update from our clinic. Let us know if you need to schedule a visit anytime soon.
rationale: Generic customer check-in

body: Doc, a quick tip: adding photos of your waiting area increases trust for new patients by 15%. Want me to send a reminder tomorrow morning to snap a pic?
rationale: General category best practice

body: Suresh, updating your menu photos with high-quality shots can increase delivery clicks. I can help organize a professional shoot through magicpin if you're interested?
rationale: Upsell of a relevant service

body: Lakshmi, a lot of salons in Hyderabad are seeing success offering 'Express Facials' for busy professionals. Is that something Studio11 could easily add to the catalog?
rationale: Market trend service suggestion
